_meta.resume_note: Pinned to Bakersfield College's official 2025-2026 Program Pathways Mapper. The Biology A.S.-T. is extracted; the separately titled Human Biology A.S. is outside this general-biology pass.

degrees.tmc_version_basis: The 2025-2026 map requires Calculus I and one complete two-course physics sequence, matching the prior Biology TMC rather than Biology 2.0.
degrees.catalog_status_seen: Published as an active award (control number 35302) in Bakersfield College's official 2025-2026 program map; no inactive or teach-out language is displayed.

sources.locator: Official Bakersfield College Program Pathways Mapper > Biology Associate in Science for Transfer > 2025-2026 catalog pathway; major-designated courses in terms 2-5

major_groups.choice_structure_seen: Complete PHYS B2A and PHYS B2B, or complete PHYS B4A and PHYS B4B; use the matching second course for the first physics course selected.

courses.title_seen: General Physics - Sound, Light, Electricity, Magnetism, Modern Physics

major_groups.label_seen: Transferable electives as needed to complete 60 units

degrees.notes: The official 2025-2026 program map identifies all six major components and a 60-unit Associate in Science for Transfer. Its displayed full pathway range can exceed 60 because it includes course-plan and general-education choices; the statutory degree total remains 60 and the major computes to 32 units.

notes: The Biology A.S.-T. is the only qualifying general Biology award found. Bakersfield's Human Biology A.S. is a separately titled allied-health-oriented program and was excluded by this pass's scope; certificates and other specialties were also ignored.
